provenance.author: VRAXION scaffold
provenance.sanitization: No real person, location, or private memory is represented.

episode.title: Rainy corner route to shop
episode.scene: On a rainy day, the navigator reached a familiar corner, turned right, and found the shop shortly after the turn.

cues.observed: The corner matched the remembered route point.
Rain was present during the episode.

edges.evidence: The decision point was the familiar corner.
Turning right from this corner led toward the shop.
The shop was found after the right turn.
Rain was present but did not justify the route decision.

high.reason: This relation carries the route-memory affordance.

medium.reason: Rain helps recall the episode but is not a route rule.

low.reason: The episode does not support 'rain means turn right'.

available.description: Turn right at the familiar corner.
Continue straight past the familiar corner.

taken.description: The navigator turned right at the familiar corner.

predicted.summary: Turning right at this corner should bring the navigator closer to the shop.

actual.summary: The shop was found shortly after the right turn.
actual.evidence: Observed outcome in the synthetic episode.

counterfactuals.condition: If the same rain occurred at a different corner
counterfactuals.expected_change: The right-turn action would not be justified by rain alone.

counterfactuals.condition: If the familiar corner appeared on a dry day
counterfactuals.expected_change: The route-memory affordance could still support turning right.
counterfactuals.anchor_test: Preserve landmark-route relation independent of weather.

memory_hooks.why_it_matters: Rain can help retrieve the episode without becoming the causal rule.

abstraction.pre_symbol_statement: At this remembered corner, the right turn was the action that led to the shop.
abstraction.claim_boundary: This supports a situated route-memory affordance only.
not_this: all corners require a right turn

attach.rationale: The anchor binds a landmark, an action, and the observed goal outcome.

reject.rationale: Rain is a retrieval cue, not the action/outcome relation.

human_annotation.best_summary: The anchor is a situated route-memory affordance: at this corner, turning right led to the shop.
human_annotation.claim_boundary: Do not infer that rain causes or recommends turning right.
human_annotation.notes: The important lesson is the corner-action-outcome relation, not the weather.

observations.observation: Synthetic scaffold example validated as a public non-private cell.
